Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Russian painter, Vassily Kandinsky. You will discover his labour with Old city n°2, Park of Saint-cloud, Rider (improvisation n°12).

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Jean-Honore Fragonard.You will discover his labour with Psyche showing her sisters her gifts from cupid, The storm, Night scene or the Beggar’s dream.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vermeer and music - the art of love and leisure
programme.desc: La National Gallery de Londres propose un nouveau regard sur lun des plus grands artistes de tous les temps, Johannes Vermeer. Il est le peintre de la celèbre toile “La Jeune Fille à la perle”. Dans une exposition intitulee "Vermeer et la musique : Lart de lamour et des loisirs

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Le musee du Petit-Palais a ete construit à Paris pour l’Exposition Universelle de 1900, en meme temps que le Grand Palais. La collection comprend des chefs-d’œuvre comme le Portrait de l’artiste en costume oriental de Rembrandt, le Port de mer au soleil couchant du Lorrain ou les Trois baigneuses de Cezanne. C’est egalement là qu’on peut admirer le fameux et très sensuel Sommeil de Gustave Courbet. Bonne visite !

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Lhistoire des hôtels de Rohan et de Soubise, cest lhistoire dune folle ambition qui va animer la maison des princes de Soubise dans leur reve de grandeur de 1705 à 1752. Lambition du prince est double : transformer lhôtel de Guise en hôtel de Soubise pour le prince heritier, et faire construire un deuxième hôtel pour le cinquième fils, le prince-eveque de Strasbourg. Deux hôtels se font face, separes par un beau jardin dans le coeur historique de la ville. Au fur et à mesure des differentes campagnes de travaux, rien ne sera trop beau pour les princes de Soubise. Un ensemble urbain paradoxal qui temoigne à la fois du modèle parisien « entre cour et jardin » et de linvention des architectes pour ladapter à une parcelle irregulière, et une illustration du rôle politique des bâtiments pour laristocratie française du 18ème siècle.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: Firemen of Paris: saving Notre-Dame!
programme.desc: The fire at Notre-Dame de Paris on April 15, 2019, shocked the world. The flames ravaged the cathedrals roof and threatened to destroy its historic heritage, including its precious stained-glass windows and millennia-old sculptures.The firefighters worked tirelessly to bring the blaze under control, managing to save the main structure and some of the most precious relics.The incident sparked a massive wave of international solidarity, with pledges of funding for the reconstruction of this iconic building, which is a symbol of French culture and history.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: C’est l’un des artistes les plus controverses et pourtant, l’un des plus influents. La collection de Picasso contenait principalement des Renoir. Matisse le venerait. Monet egalement. Renoir a ete crucial dans la creation du mouvement impressionniste, avant de le rejeter totalement pour se lancer dans un genre radicalement different, avec beaucoup de succès. La Collection Barnes à Philadelphie possède plus de toiles de Renoir que n’importe quelle autre galerie au monde et c’est là que nous tenterons de lever le voile sur l’histoire remarquable de cet incroyable artiste.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: The Azay-le-Rideau Castle is nestled at the core of the old city and surrounded by a romantic park, the castle seems to be built on water. This intimate, almost hidden edifice is endowed with an ageless charm and a powerful bond with history. Today, it is renowned as one of the most representative works of the period, revealing a whole new conception of architecture and life. It was indeed a place meant to house knowledgeable ladies of the time. Today, this Renaissance treasure counts more than 300 000 visitors a year and represents a considerable economic asset for the city. It is also the combination of expertise, skills, character and devotion of its caretakers which animates this splendid castle with a historic soul.

programme.title: Museum Tour
programme.sub-title: La Closerie Falbala - Dans l’oeil de Jean Dubuffet
programme.desc: Museum Tour is a series that invites the viewer to discover unique which, for the artists chosen, have been incubators of creativity and a source of inspiration. Under their patronage, some of those sites have been turned into museums or foundations where their memory and work have picked up a life of their own.Each of the episodes will tell the story uniting the artist with a particular place, seeking intimacy in the process.This show’s agenda is decidedly visual. Works of art and the places in which they’re set will be filmed in such a way as to arouse strong emotions, thus placing the viewer in the spot, as if they were present in the flesh. This angle for the spectacular and search for beauty will enhance the accessibility of the series for an uninformed audience.A family-friendly documentary series which, beyond the fascinating information provided, offers a sight, sound and emotional journey into a captivating, palpable and contemporary form.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Construction of the cathedral began in 1247 and was only finished in 1880 after an interruption that lasted more than 300 years. Ribbed vaults and flying buttresses, the film explores the architectural vocabulary of the gothic style and its building methods. It reveals the most recent contribution of metal to architecture. It demonstrates how this cathedral that embodies German unity is at the same time archetypal of the Gothic style and of a 19th century building.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts etait la toute première retrospective consacree au portrait dÉdouard Manet. Couvrant lensemble de la carrière de cet artiste enigmatique et parfois controverse, lexposition a rassemble des œuvres provenant dEurope, dAsie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet na jamais fait lobjet dune exposition, bien quil represente environ la moitie de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalites litteraires, politiques et artistiques de lepoque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la societe parisienne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Phil Grabsky, realisateur recompense à plusieurs reprises, pose un regard neuf sur celui qui est sans conteste l’artiste le plus aime au monde en utilisant les mots du peintre lui-meme. Moi, Claude Monet revèle de nouvelles facettes de l’homme qui a donne naissance au mouvement impressionniste grâce à un tableau et qui fut certainement l’un des peintres les plus influents et renommes du XIXe et du debut du XXe siècle. Tourne à travers l’Europe, sur les lieux où il a peint, Moi, Claude Monet est une exploration filmique inedite et intime de certains des decors cultes les plus apprecies de l’art occidental.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: Before entering the old 19th century mansion which houses the Jean-Jacques Henner museum, it should be noted that it once belonged to another painter, contemporary of Henner: Guillaume Dubufe. The interest of the museum is thus twofold. On the one hand, the visitor takes a trip back in time through the specifics of a mansion built and decorated under the 3rd Republic. On the other, it reveals the work of Jean Jacques Henner, considered at the turn of the 20th century as one of the most important of his time.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Geoffroy Van Der Hasselt, press photographer. He worked for a Belgian newspaper for which he covered local and international news. Today, he works for AFP, Agence France-Presse, and covers French politics, news, sports events and international affairs.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les animatrices vedettes Nicki Chapman et Jules Hudson sechappent à la campagne pour partir à la chasse aux antiquites avec Natasha Raskin et Phillip Serrell. Cest une bataille filles contre garçons, chaque equipe disposant de 400 £. Le voyage commence à Wormsley, dans le Herefordshire, puis les deux equipes se dirigent vers le pays de Galles et lOxfordshire, avant de finir à North Finchley, à Londres, pour une vente aux enchères.En chemin, les filles rencontrent un fabricant de sabots qui sculpte les chaussures à la main. Pendant ce temps, les garçons se rendent au Herefordshire Light Infantry Museum pour en apprendre davantage sur l’implication du regiment à Gallipoli.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: L’histoire de la mort et de la resurrection du Christ domine la culture occidentale depuis 2000 ans. C’est probablement l’un des evenements les plus marquants de l’histoire, que l’on retrouve dans les Évangiles aussi bien que dans les tableaux des plus grands artistes. Ce long metrage explore l’histoire de Pâques dans l’art, depuis l’epoque des premiers chretiens jusqu’à nos jours. Tourne à Jerusalem, aux Etats-Unis et en Europe, le film explore les differentes representations de Pâques à travers les âges et nous dresse ainsi un portrait de notre histoire commune.

programme.title: Museum Tour
programme.sub-title: La Guerre et la Paix - Dans l’œil de Pablo Picasso
programme.desc: Museum Tour is a series that invites the viewer to discover unique which, for the artists chosen, have been incubators of creativity and a source of inspiration. Under their patronage, some of those sites have been turned into museums or foundations where their memory and work have picked up a life of their own.Each of the episodes will tell the story uniting the artist with a particular place, seeking intimacy in the process.This show’s agenda is decidedly visual. Works of art and the places in which they’re set will be filmed in such a way as to arouse strong emotions, thus placing the viewer in the spot, as if they were present in the flesh. This angle for the spectacular and search for beauty will enhance the accessibility of the series for an uninformed audience.A family-friendly documentary series which, beyond the fascinating information provided, offers a sight, sound and emotional journey into a captivating, palpable and contemporary form.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The spectacular sculptures and paintings of Michelangelo seem so familiar to us, but what do we really know about this renaissance genius? Who was this ambitious and passionate man? A virtuoso craftsman, Michelangelo’s artistry is evident in everything he touched. Beautiful and diverse works such as the towering statue of David, the deeply moving Pietà in the Papal Basilica of St. Peter and his tour-de-force, the Sistine Chapel ceiling still leave us breathless today.

programme.title: St+art India
programme.desc: In the heart of India, Bombay welcome the festival ST+ART, one of the most big urban arts festival in the country. Discover the backstage of the event and understand the relation between the habitants, artists and monumental murals.

programme.title: Art Live
programme.desc: In June 2017, for the European Heritage Days, the “Rencontres Audiovisuelles” in Lille launched an international Video Mapping competition. Candidates, students and professionals in audiovisual, animation film, digital arts and graphic design had two months to prepare a 2-to-5-minutes mapping for the front of the "Porte de Paris" in Lille, on the topic "Gate of Time".

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Matisse au MoMA et à la Tate Modern
programme.desc: Decouvrez l’œuvre de Matisse à travers les expositions de la Tate Modern à Londres et du MoMA de New York (2014) et profitez de la performance originale de la danseuse etoile du Royal Ballet Zenaida Yanowsky, qui interprète les couleurs et le dynamisme de la peinture de Matisse sur la musique jazz de Courtney Pine. Ponctue d’entrevues avec des experts ainsi que d’images d’archives rares de Matisse au travail, ce documentaire permettra d’apprecier tout particulièrement le dernier chapitre de la carrière du peintre et notamment ses gouaches decoupees.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pour les 500 ans de la mort de Raphaël, une grande exposition a ouvert ses portes à Rome. « Exhibition on Screen » a eu un accès exclusif à cet evenement, qui reunit plus de 200 œuvres majeures de ce maître de la Renaissance. Le film part à la decouverte de l’exposition et eclaire d’une nouvelle lumière le travail de cet artiste souvent incompris ou, au contraire, idealise.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Edouard Manet.You will discover his labour with Lola de valence, Olympia, Eel and red mullet.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In this inspiring episode, we join Team Broken Earth on a medical mission in Guatemala, witnessing firsthand the life-changing work taking place in local hospitals. From dawn until night, Canadian and Guatemalan healthcare teams perform surgeries, consult patients, and provide care that is often out of reach for many families.We meet patients of all ages—children awaiting orthopedic procedures, adults seeking mobility restoration, elders who have endured years of pain. Their stories highlight the profound need for global medical partnerships and the impact compassionate care can have on entire communities.Inside the operating rooms, surgical teams work with extraordinary precision, focus, and teamwork. Outside, families wait with hope and gratitude. This episode is a tribute to the power of service, cultural exchange, and the shared humanity that defines global health. Helping others, we learn, is one of the most powerful forms of healing.

programme.title: My Zen People
programme.desc: He had a real professional rise, quickly moving from commercial to sales manager. But the awareness quickly catches up with him too: what is the purpose of all this? Is it a real pursuit of happiness? Daniel keeps his acquired skills and puts them to the benefit of his passion for yoga. Follow Daniel until the opening of his yoga and community space.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... Youre on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Beautiful landscapes
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... Youre on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Create Your Calm: A Grounding Flow for Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Cultivate a sense of peace and stability with the Create Your Calm sequence. This restorative flow stays low to allow for a deeper connection to the earth and its grounding energy. Connect with your heart more completely and welcome a softer awareness with this gentle practice.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers a Pilates session to gently strengthen the body. Guillaume and Sabrina encourage participants to refocus and release stress with smooth movements and deep stretches. They emphasize the importance of breathing, which is essential for supplying oxygen to the muscles. This relaxing and effective session is ideal for a moment of well-being at home.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: Sequence joyeuse et elegante, "Grace et Gratitude" ouvre l’avant du corps avec une serie d’extensions dynamiques vers l’arrière. Faites rayonner la lumière de votre cœur en apprenant à respirer avec ampleur. Cette pratique encourage une action guidee par des intentions d’amour, de pardon et de gratitude.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Après quatre jours de competition acharnee, cest enfin le jour de la finale. Mais avant de decouvrir les notes de leurs proprietaires respectifs, chaque candidat aura loccasion de savoir ce que pensent ses adversaires de ses choix deco. Et cest Mickael qui ouvre le bal et qui rejoint notre experte en deco Valerie Damidot. Il est temps pour lui de decouvrir si ses camarades ont ete aussi stratèges que lui.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to an intense and motivating cardio session. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing the importance of preparing the body for an energetic workout. The program includes two standing movement exercises, followed by two on the floor, each performed in four sets of 40 seconds. The goal is to raise the heart rate and strengthen the muscles by alternating between intense efforts and floor exercises. The friendly and fun atmosphere makes this session perfect for training in a great mood while pushing your limits.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If youre a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brevonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, well explore the Libournais region, where well uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, well arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reflect and Connect: Open Your Shoulders, Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Are you ready to fly? Reflect and Connect will engage your whole body with a series of poses that first calm and center, and then awaken and inspire. Build energy and a sense of security before channeling your curiosity and testing your limits.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Cest reparti pour une nouvelle semaine de competition. Mais avant de saffronter chacun leur tour à coups de pinceaux et de clous, les quatre decorateurs amateurs ont rendez-vous à Bruxelles dans latelier. Loccasion de jauger leur adversaire. Et le premier pretendant au titre d’as de la deco, le voici : Mickaël, 34 ans, scenographe et à la recherche dun emploi. Mais pas le temps de rever. La concurrence arrive avec Aurelie, 31 ans, professeur darts plastiques.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest la discrète Valerie qui va tenter de prouver que lAs de la deco, cest elle. A 41 ans, cette Liegeoise est passionnee par le home staging ou lart de mettre une propriete en valeur pour en stimuler la vente ou la location. Un precepte que Valerie applique dailleurs dans son interieur.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourdhui cest sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en foret à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congelateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons egalement loccasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnes par les champignons, devenus des specialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Regis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la decouverte de plats typiquement français avec d’etonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus precisement dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau etre le premier port de peche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone reservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour decouvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’elevage dans une ferme aquacole en Mediterranee, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et meme le cabillaud dans l’immense marche de Rungis. Julie a challenge le Chef Olivier Bellin installe à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson meconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Si l’ete est la saison où les legumes abondent au potager, il serait dommage de ne pas savourer ceux que les saisons plus fraîches nous offrent : potages, tourtes, potees ou gratins mettent à l’honneur des legumes de saisons, ideals pour se rechauffer. Pour debuter ce nouveau voyage, un legume qui trônait dejà sur les tables de la Grèce Antique : le salsifis que Julie cuisinera avec une drôle de tourtière…L’hiver c’est aussi la saison du chou alors direction la Champagne pour y apprendre la recette de la potee locale qui devrait remplir le ventre d’un grand nombre de convives.Ce petit tour de France nous emmènera aussi à la decouverte d’orfèvres du maraîchage qui sculptent legumes et fruits d’hiver, et vous presentera differentes techniques et methodes pour sublimer vos potagers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas etre deçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Decouvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits preferes des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au meme titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Cote recettes, Julie fera decouvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous reserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien etre.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Avec son amie Myriam, Luana Belmondo prepare deux recettes à base de safran. Au programme : orecchiette (petites pâtes italiennes) avec de la saucisse, et lotte au citron confit avec sa puree d’asperges.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, Luana accueille Heloïse Brion, creatrice de "Miss Maggies Kitchen

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Yann Arthus-Bertrand thus continues his world tour and his inventory of the planet with the great rivers that suffer from mans excesses as a common thread. " So the great rivers may live" is the discovery of places, men and women who are fighting so that our waterways simply have their place on Earth. Thanks to his genius, man is correcting his mistakes: the Aral Sea, which once disappeared, is coming back. In New York, millions of people have drinking water thanks to the natural virtues of the forest.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers a Pilates session to gently strengthen the body. Guillaume and Sabrina encourage participants to refocus and release stress with smooth movements and deep stretches. They emphasize the importance of breathing, which is essential for supplying oxygen to the muscles. This relaxing and effective session is ideal for a moment of well-being at home.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la region aux côtes de la petillante Marithe. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glaces maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce periple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcement l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Create Your Calm: A Grounding Flow for Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Cultivate a sense of peace and stability with the Create Your Calm sequence. This restorative flow stays low to allow for a deeper connection to the earth and its grounding energy. Connect with your heart more completely and welcome a softer awareness with this gentle practice.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Direction le Loir-et-Cher pour une chasse à courre encadree par les equipes de l’ONCFS. Prenons ensuite la route des Vosges pour cuisiner aux côtes de Mauricette une savoureuse gigue de cerf. Allons à la rencontre de Pierre en Côte d’Or où il fabrique des trompes de chasse, un outil indispensable à la venerie. Julie retrouvera aussi deux chasseurs girondins pour une après-midi de chasse à la tonne dès plus originale avant de rejoindre Joël en Aquitaine pour une autre recette de gibier à plume. Nous parlerons ensuite avec Laurent du metier de piqueux : ce dresseur de chiens destines à la venerie. Cette fois-ci ce sera Frederic Robert qui nous concoctera une recette de lièvre frotte au cacao et cuit dans un sarcophage d’argile.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, lets discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo offers a recipe for celeriac risotto with citrus powder. She will also prepare black rice with spring vegetables. A real treat for the taste buds!

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Discover an Italian culinary staple: ravioli. Luana Belmondo, accompanied by her son Alessandro, makes her recipe for ricotta arugula ravioli with artichoke and almond sauce. The duo also prepare choco ravioli stuffed with pistachio custard and strawberry coulis.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: On Jeju Island, home of the legendary Haenyeo divers, we experience one of the most awe-inspiring cultural traditions in the world. These women—many in their 60s, 70s, and 80s—dive deep into cold waters without oxygen tanks, harvesting shellfish and seaweed with incredible skill and stamina.Mike joins them, suiting up to attempt the dive himself. The comparison is humbling: while the Haenyeo descend gracefully and calmly, Mike struggles with breath-holding, buoyancy, and cold exposure. Their mastery is a testament to generations of practice, strength, and community support.After the dive, we cook the day’s catch together, sharing stories and laughter. This episode celebrates resilience, empowerment, and the extraordinary capabilities of women who have shaped the identity of Jeju for centuries.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: London and Wales - The Way Back
programme.desc: Our exploration of ancestry begins in London at the Genealogical Society, where archival records trace Mike’s family back nearly 300 years. With this new information, we travel to Wales, following the path of ancestors through rural landscapes and small villages that still carry the echoes of the past.The journey becomes hands-on as we try sheepdog herding, learning how shepherding has shaped Welsh culture. Next, we experience a unique mental health therapy involving hugging donkeys, discovering how animal connection can reduce stress and promote emotional well-being.With a local forager, we explore edible plants in the Welsh countryside, uncovering how communities have relied on the land for nourishment for generations. The journey concludes in a historic chapel where Mike stands on the exact spot where his ancestor was baptized three centuries earlier—a profound moment of connection across time.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Our culinary journey through Seoul begins with the smoky, flavour-rich world of Korean BBQ, where sizzling plates and communal dining embody the social heart of Korean culture. From there, we explore one of Seoul’s most iconic fish markets, where we try fresh king crab and live octopus while learning how the countrys coastal heritage shaped its food traditions.Next, we visit the bustling herbal medicine market, where shelves overflow with ginseng, roots, mushrooms, and medicinal teas used for centuries in Traditional Korean Medicine. Here, local practitioners explain how balance, Qi, and seasonal eating contribute to long-term health.Our journey ends in Seoul’s thriving coffee scene, tasting artisan brews before joining your friend Chris for a peaceful riverside walk and dessert. This episode reveals that in Korea, food is more than nourishment—it is community, medicine, memory, and identity.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Yann Arthus-Bertrand thus continues his world tour and his inventory of the planet with the great rivers that suffer from mans excesses as a common thread. " So the great rivers may live" is the discovery of places, men and women who are fighting so that our waterways simply have their place on Earth. Thanks to his genius, man is correcting his mistakes: the Aral Sea, which once disappeared, is coming back. In New York, millions of people have drinking water thanks to the natural virtues of the forest.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In a tranquil mountain monastery, Chef-Monk Jeong Kwan invites us into her world of mindful, intentional cooking. Her approach to food is rooted in simplicity, compassion, and a deep respect for nature. Together, we pick vegetables from the temple garden and learn why plant-based, seasonal eating has been central to Korean temple cuisine for generations.A highlight of the episode is learning the art of fermentation—from soy sauce aged in clay pots to rich, umami-packed bean pastes that require months or years to mature. Jeong Kwan explains that fermentation mirrors the human journey: slow, patient, and transformative.Cooking with her becomes a meditation, revealing that food prepared with intention nourishes not only the body but the spirit. This episode challenges us to rethink our relationship with ingredients, time, and the act of eating itself.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Our season begins in Guatemala with an ascent up the mighty Fuego Volcano, one of the most active volcanoes in the world. As we climb through loose ash and steep ridges, the powerful rumble beneath our feet reveals the dynamic relationship between humans and the natural forces that shape our planet. The climb becomes both a physical challenge and a reminder of the deep connection between environment and well-being.After the volcano, we descend into the world of ancient healing with a traditional Temazcal lodge, where Mayan practitioners guide us through a powerful cleansing ritual using steam, herbs, and ceremony. Inside the dark, humid chamber, the experience becomes a profound demonstration of how culture, community, and spirituality intersect with health.Our journey continues at a coffee plantation, where we learn how altitude, soil, and sustainable farming practices impact not only flavour, but also community health and economic stability. By the end of the episode, we reconnect.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In this inspiring episode, we join Team Broken Earth on a medical mission in Guatemala, witnessing firsthand the life-changing work taking place in local hospitals. From dawn until night, Canadian and Guatemalan healthcare teams perform surgeries, consult patients, and provide care that is often out of reach for many families.We meet patients of all ages—children awaiting orthopedic procedures, adults seeking mobility restoration, elders who have endured years of pain. Their stories highlight the profound need for global medical partnerships and the impact compassionate care can have on entire communities.Inside the operating rooms, surgical teams work with extraordinary precision, focus, and teamwork. Outside, families wait with hope and gratitude. This episode is a tribute to the power of service, cultural exchange, and the shared humanity that defines global health. Helping others, we learn, is one of the most powerful forms of healing.

programme.title: My Zen People
programme.desc: He had a real professional rise, quickly moving from commercial to sales manager. But the awareness quickly catches up with him too: what is the purpose of all this? Is it a real pursuit of happiness? Daniel keeps his acquired skills and puts them to the benefit of his passion for yoga. Follow Daniel until the opening of his yoga and community space.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reflect and Connect: Open Your Shoulders, Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Are you ready to fly? Reflect and Connect will engage your whole body with a series of poses that first calm and center, and then awaken and inspire. Build energy and a sense of security before channeling your curiosity and testing your limits.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" focuses on a muscle strengthening and mobility session, carefully designed to relax and energize the body. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing movements for the neck, shoulders, and chest to release tension. Each exercise aims to improve movement range and posture, fostering a connection between the brain and body to prevent injuries. Through progressive rotations and stretches, the session stimulates joint mobility, especially in the knees and ankles. This comprehensive and nurturing approach is ideal for reconnecting with oneself while gently strengthening the body.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reconnect and Refine: Hip Opening and Abdominal Strengthening
programme.desc: Connect with the essence of your being with Reconnect and Refine. This exhilarating sequence encourages you to find comfort in the present moment, and let go of preconceived expectations or agendas. It is not about where you are going, but where you are.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to an intense and motivating cardio session. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a full warm-up, emphasizing the importance of preparing the body for an energetic workout. The program includes two standing movement exercises, followed by two on the floor, each performed in four sets of 40 seconds. The goal is to raise the heart rate and strengthen the muscles by alternating between intense efforts and floor exercises. The friendly and fun atmosphere makes this session perfect for training in a great mood while pushing your limits.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reflect and Connect: Open Your Shoulders, Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Are you ready to fly? Reflect and Connect will engage your whole body with a series of poses that first calm and center, and then awaken and inspire. Build energy and a sense of security before channeling your curiosity and testing your limits.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Cest reparti pour une nouvelle semaine de competition. Mais avant de saffronter chacun leur tour à coups de pinceaux et de clous, les quatre decorateurs amateurs ont rendez-vous à Bruxelles dans latelier. Loccasion de jauger leur adversaire. Et le premier pretendant au titre d’as de la deco, le voici : Mickaël, 34 ans, scenographe et à la recherche dun emploi. Mais pas le temps de rever. La concurrence arrive avec Aurelie, 31 ans, professeur darts plastiques.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest la discrète Valerie qui va tenter de prouver que lAs de la deco, cest elle. A 41 ans, cette Liegeoise est passionnee par le home staging ou lart de mettre une propriete en valeur pour en stimuler la vente ou la location. Un precepte que Valerie applique dailleurs dans son interieur.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus precisement dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau etre le premier port de peche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone reservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour decouvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’elevage dans une ferme aquacole en Mediterranee, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et meme le cabillaud dans l’immense marche de Rungis. Julie a challenge le Chef Olivier Bellin installe à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson meconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas etre deçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Decouvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits preferes des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au meme titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Cote recettes, Julie fera decouvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous reserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien etre.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place preponderante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la decouverte des differentes races et types delevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a lune des productions les plus variees au monde. Il existe plus dune quarantaine de races repertoriees en 5 categories : precoces, d’herbage, rustiques, merinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentes qui interesse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait decouvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffine !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la region aux côtes de la petillante Marithe. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glaces maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce periple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcement l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour decouvrir des races anciennes de volaille reintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’eleveur Fred Menager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour decouvrir comment est attribue le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Perigord pour preparer un civet de dindon. Installee dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour decouvrir un etonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo gives you ideas for recipes that are easy to prepare using a wok! Thanks to this cooking method, you can create delicious, quick recipes using leftovers from your fridge or cupboard.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Coconut milk is easy to cook, and can be used with a wide range of ingredients, from stews and soups to sweet recipes.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: On se retrouve en Israël dans le désert du Neguev, Elaine cherche des solutions pour lutter contre la désertification. L’objet de ses recherches : les arbres, peu consommateurs d’eau. Au Mali, on retrouve les Dogons : les cultivateurs du désert. Il nous fait découvrir les recettes de son peuple pour gérer l’eau. Dans cette partie du Mali où il ne pleut quasiment jamais. En Palestine, le village de Wadi Fukeen. Un village où les agriculteurs utilisent un système d’irrigation et de partage de l’eau vieux de plus de 300 ans et basé sur le respect et la confiance. Et en Palestine à Gaza où les specialistes se battent pour sauver des enfants palestiniens rendus malades par de l’eau impropre à la consommation. Dans la Vallée du Jourdain où trois pays en conflit affrontent les mêmes problèmes : le manque d’eau. Au Bresil, dans le château d’eau du Brésil où l’eau, d’une pureté exceptionnelle est menacée par l’exploitation du minerai de fer qui pollue la nappe phréatique. Et à.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: The JuraThe Franche-Comte with its lush green landscapes is also home to innumerable picturesque towns. We visit Baume-les-Messieurs, with its majestic 12th century Romanesque abbey church; Dole on the River Doubs, capital of the arrondissement of the same name; the Château de Joux, a magnificent military ensemble from the Middle Ages.Directed by: Magali Nguyen (season 1, France, 2014).

programme.title: Trekenguruer: Skogens spøkelser
programme.desc: En av Australias underligste skapninger, Lumholtz trekenguruer, er som spøkelser i skogene nord i Queensland. Vi vandrer gjennom villmarken i Atherton Tableland, for å få et innblikk i livene til disse sky klatrespesialistene.

programme.title: Ville Taiwan: Jungeløya
programme.desc: Taiwan er en helt unik øy. Den ligger ved Krepsens vendekrets, har tropiske strender, fuktig skog og snøkledde fjell.

programme.title: Amur-tigeren
programme.desc: "Secret Kingdom of the Amur Tiger" tar oss med inn i et øde kongerike for å avsløre hemmelighetene til noen mektige tigre. Man bruker viltkameraer, zoomobjektiver og droner for å følge dyrene tett. Vi får se hvordan tigrene tar seg gjennom og lever side om side i smale passasjer, bruker hemmelige meldinger for å kommunisere med hverandre, jakter på bytter og utnytter årstidene. Det endelige målet er å finne en partner og føre arten videre.

programme.title: Asias kjempeveps
programme.desc: I hjertet av enhver asiatisk kjempevepskoloni finner man en allmektig dronning. Hun forlater ett bol for å starte et annet, og fyller det raskt opp med en lojal hær av nådeløse drapsmaskiner som er villige til å ofre alt for å forsvare henne.

programme.title: Australias Wild Woodlands
programme.desc: Australias vidstrakte eukalyptusskoger huser et utrolig utvalg av arter som ikke finnes andre stedet i verden. Mange av disse eldgamle økosystemene har i stor grad forblitt uendret helt siden dinosaurenes tid, men nå er fremtiden usikker for flere arter. Vi avdekker hvordan klimaendringene endrer den sarte balansen for disse utrolige dyrene som lever i disse majestetiske skogene.

programme.title: Ville Taiwan: Jungeløya
programme.desc: Taiwan er en helt unik øy. Den ligger ved Krepsens vendekrets, har tropiske strender, fuktig skog og snøkledde fjell.

programme.title: Amur-tigeren
programme.desc: "Secret Kingdom of the Amur Tiger" tar oss med inn i et øde kongerike for å avsløre hemmelighetene til noen mektige tigre. Det endelige målet er å finne en partner og føre arten videre.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin drar dypt inn i Australias mangroveskog, og leter etter utrolige dyr som nyter sumplivet. Han vasser gjennom gjørme, og møter en hissig mangrovekrabbe med livsfarlige klør før han fanger en shovel-nosed ray med bare hendene. Phil har hele tiden følge av verdens mest forhatte skapning – myggen.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Familien Pol må plante ferdig høyfrø, og de setter opp bikuber!

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: I denne episoden ser vi på den utrolige tilpasningen og utfordringene til dyrene i en verden hvor det knapt finnes noe liv.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Veterinær i Yukon
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley skynder seg for å behandle en katt som sliter med blæren, men det er mulig at hun trenger hjelp med den mystiske tilstanden. Så rykker hun ut til en gård for å teste det nye systemet til bisonoksene. Senere åpner dr. Oakley et vaksinesenter, ser til to ildere og behandler to schæfere som har et typisk problem for rasen.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Veterinær i Yukon
programme.desc: To bjørnunger trenger tilsyn av dr. Oakley før den lange hjemreisen. Eieren er bekymret over kattens mange munnsår, men dr. Oakley vet råd. Det som skulle være en enkel operasjon, gir labradoren Rusty pustevansker. To geitekillinger må kastreres, og dr. Oakley og døtrene skal bade med hester.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Vi drar ut på en gripende safari gjennom Afrikas ville elver og vannhull, og er vitne til eksplosive kamper som starter i vannkanten. Usynlighet og smyging er de ultimate overlevelsesverktøyene i Afrikas utemmede vannveier, fra en gepard som forsvinner fra overflaten på sekunder til en krokodille mot ti løver, og en bøffel i drakamp med en krokodilles nese.

programme.title: De store kattedyrene angriper
programme.desc: Klatrende leoparder, sterke jaguarer og gravende sandkatter; se strategiene som gjør store kattedyr til en av verdens farligste dyrefamilier.

programme.title: Vill vinter
programme.desc: Å overleve i skogene nord i Finland er et kappløp mot årstidene, med sin grove villmark og ekstreme klima. Vi følger det utrolige dagliglivet til en brunbjørnmor som risikerer alt for å oppdra ungene sine. Hun kommer ut av vinterdvalen tynn og sliten, og må lede ungene gjennom en kort sommer der mat – og overlevelse – er det eneste på prioriteringslisten.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Vi drar ut på en gripende safari gjennom Afrikas ville elver og vannhull, og er vitne til eksplosive kamper som starter i vannkanten. programme.title: De store kattenes odysse
programme.desc: Ta en titt på noen av de beste øyeblikkene som Dereck og Beverly Joubert har filmet i løpet av sin 30-årige søken etter å komme nær store katter.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Med bisamangrep og en katt uten øye er klinikken full av overraskelser. I mellomtiden haster dr. Pol til en gård for å hjelpe en ku som har holdt på å føde i over 24 timer, dr. Brenda gir steg-for-steg-instrukser til en familie som holder høylandsfe, og dr. Lisa sjekker tennene til et esel. Dr. Nicole har en spennende nyhet.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Det er morsdag! Dr. Pol og dr. Brenda skynder seg for å hjelpe dyr som strever med å føde, mens dr. Lisa behandler ei ku med fødselsskader. To valper får vaksiner, og to eldre hunder trenger hjelp med å fjerne pigger. Morsdag nærmer seg, og dr. Pol og Charles ordner en overraskelse til Diane og Beth.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol ønsker en ny veterinær velkommen til klinikken akkurat i tide til å hjelpe teamet med en bølge av nye saker. Dr. Pol behandler en lokal politihund med en skadet pote, dr. Nicole undersøker en servicehund etter et slagsmål, dr. Lisa syr en stor rift på en hest og dr. Brenda behandler en katt med brannsår. På sin andre arbeidsdag må dr. Olivia hjelpe dr. Lisa når en ku skal kalve.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: De travle vannhullene i Sør-Afrika setter scenen for brutale kamper mellom erkefiender. På vei ut for å se på vilt får vi sete på første rad når løvene benytter seg av kaoset under en stor panikkflukt, og brutalt dreper fire bøfler. Senere er det et annet stort slag som finner sted i en halvveis uttørket elv når en bøffel må kjempe mot fire store kattedyr.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: I Sør-Afrikas villmark blir dyrene desperate i de tørre vintermånedene. Sultne krokodiller sloss mot en farlig gruppe flodhester, flodhestene prøver seg på en gruppe hannløver, en honninggrevling kjemper for livet mot leoparder, og villhunder skaper komplett kaos hvor enn de går.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Vi drar ut på en gripende safari gjennom Afrikas ville elver og vannhull, og er vitne til eksplosive kamper som starter i vannkanten. Usynlighet og smyging er de ultimate overlevelsesverktøyene i Afrikas utemmede vannveier, fra en gepard som forsvinner fra overflaten på sekunder til en krokodille mot ti løver, og en bøffel i drakamp med en krokodilles nese.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: På en episk safari avslører vi hvordan grensen mellom jeger og bytte hviskes ut i villmarken. Vi ser på utrolige fremvisninger av rå, utemmet natur, fra elefanter som stormer gjennom bushen med en løve på støttennene til revirkamper mellom hannleoparder, og en flokk hyener som driver bort en løve fra sitt eget bøffelbytte.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Livet i den afrikanske bushen er et strategispill for å overleve for de som bor der. Men det mødrene som viser eksepsjonelt mot når det gjelder å beskytte sine små. De frodige gresslettene byr på gjemmesteder for babyene men også perfekt kamuflasje for luskende rovdyr. Vi ser på de utrolige måtene disse modige matriarkene forer, forsvarer og oppdrar sine barn.

programme.title: Isbjørnenes kongerike
programme.desc: Dennis søker i Manitoba-villmarken etter en isbjørnhule i håp om å fange de første øyeblikkene til en unges liv i naturen.

programme.title: Isbjørnenes kongerike
programme.desc: Dennis følger en hunnbjørn med to unger som skal ta den farlige ferden over isen, før de stilles overfor enda større utfordringer.

programme.title: Født til å drepe
programme.desc: Isbjørnen er verdens største landrovdyr, men blir født blind og døv. Hvordan blir en hjelpeløs unge til et dyktig rovdyr?

programme.title: Isbjørnenes kongerike
programme.desc: Dennis søker i Manitoba-villmarken etter en isbjørnhule i håp om å fange de første øyeblikkene til en unges liv i naturen.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Med bisamangrep og en katt uten øye er klinikken full av overraskelser. I mellomtiden haster dr. Pol til en gård for å hjelpe en ku som har holdt på å føde i over 24 timer, dr. Brenda gir steg-for-steg-instrukser til en familie som holder høylandsfe, og dr. Lisa sjekker tennene til et esel. Dr. Nicole har en spennende nyhet.

programme.title: De store kattedyrene angriper
programme.desc: Klatrende leoparder, sterke jaguarer og gravende sandkatter; se strategiene som gjør store kattedyr til en av verdens farligste dyrefamilier.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: På en episk safari avslører vi hvordan grensen mellom jeger og bytte hviskes ut i villmarken. Vi ser på utrolige fremvisninger av rå, utemmet natur, fra elefanter som stormer gjennom bushen med en løve på støttennene til revirkamper mellom hannleoparder, og en flokk hyener som driver bort en løve fra sitt eget bøffelbytte.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Urfolkslærer Phil Breslin drar ut til Australias notoriske våtmarker for å finne tre dyr som er laget for dette fuktige og våte miljøet. Phil står ansikt til ansikt med den unike australske fersvannskrokodillen, en stor rovfisk kalt barramundi samt saltvannskrokodillen, et av verdens farligste dyr og største krypdyr.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Pol-familien har nådd det farligste stadiet med å demontere den 100 år gamle låven: Å ta ned bjelkene. Så, hvis alt går bra, vil de frakte bjelkene tilbake til gården. Hver del av denne prosessen må orkestreres nøye for å beskytte disse uerstattelige bjelkene. I mellomtiden prøver Beth å trene Clovis etter at han rømmer fra gården.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals: Høydepunkter
programme.desc: Ugler kan "se" ved hjelp av ørene, og kan kanskje også høre om mus er gravide. Neshorn har hud som svetter blod.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Veterinær i Yukon
programme.desc: Vinteren er på vei, og dr. Oakley skal forberede dyrene i Alaska og Yukon på kulda. En hest må få hjelp med tannproblemene, og en annen må undersøkes nøye etter å ha slitt med neseblod.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Veterinær i Yukon
programme.desc: Alle må hjelpe til da dr. Oakley skal kastrere en gammel villhest. Så er de spente på om den kastrerte hesten kan gjøre hoppene drektige før vinteren. Det som virker som en ufarlig kul, kan være noe mer alvorlig for hunden Curly.

programme.title: Verdens dødeligste slanger
programme.desc: Slanger i Afrika blir rangert fra minst til mest dødelig. I Afrika er mambaer og kobraer farlige og dødelige, men med pytoner, huggormer og verdens giftigste snoker lagt til i miksen, er det mange flere uventede kandidater som kjemper om tittelen om å være dødeligst.

programme.title: Isbjørnenes kongerike
programme.desc: Dennis følger en hunnbjørn med to unger som skal ta den farlige ferden over isen, før de stilles overfor enda større utfordringer.

programme.title: The Hidden World of Snakes
programme.desc: På tvers av Asia og Europa er varierte habitater hjemmet til giftige ormer, ikoniske kobraer og kraftfulle kvelerslanger, som alle er perfekt tilpasset til sin nisje. Høyt oppe i trærne ligger hoggormene på Shedao-øya på lur, klare for å fange bytter i luften. Mangshan-hoggormen, et utviklingsmessig mesterverk, forfølger bytter mens den sømløst går i ett med mosen rundt dem. Og dypt inne i skogen beviser en burmesisk dvergpyton at noen ganger hastighet og styrke alt som trengs for å sikre seg et godt måltid.

programme.title: Verdens dødeligste slanger
programme.desc: Slanger i Afrika blir rangert fra minst til mest dødelig. I Afrika er mambaer og kobraer farlige og dødelige, men med pytoner, huggormer og verdens giftigste snoker lagt til i miksen, er det mange flere uventede kandidater som kjemper om tittelen om å være dødeligst.

programme.title: Isbjørnenes kongerike
programme.desc: Dennis følger en hunnbjørn med to unger som skal ta den farlige ferden over isen, før de stilles overfor enda større utfordringer.

programme.title: Født til å drepe
programme.desc: Isbjørnen er verdens største landrovdyr, men blir født blind og døv. Hvordan blir en hjelpeløs unge til et dyktig rovdyr?

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Nicole må gjøre alt for å redde livene til både mora og valpene når en chihuahua må føde akutt. Klinikken får inn en annerledes pasient når en katt må fjerne en fiskekrok, og både en for tidlig født geit og en redd hest trenger øyebehandling. Dr. Pol sier sin mening om et gammelt dilemma: Knasende eller glatt?

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Doc og Diane ønsker en ny frieser-unghoppe velkommen. Dr. Lisa håndterer to corgi-nødstilfeller. Dr. Olivia får hjelp med behandlingen av to hunder med merkelige sår.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Med bisamangrep og en katt uten øye er klinikken full av overraskelser. I mellomtiden haster dr. Pol til en gård for å hjelpe en ku som har holdt på å føde i over 24 timer, dr. Brenda gir steg-for-steg-instrukser til en familie som holder høylandsfe, og dr. Lisa sjekker tennene til et esel. Dr. Nicole har en spennende nyhet.

programme.title: Slanger i byen: Høydepunkter sesong
programme.desc: Simon og Sioux fortsetter opplæringen til lærlingen Mbali og stiger til nye høyder, i Bond-stil, for å hjelpe henne med å redde en diger svart mamba. Mbali er assistent da Simon fanger en grønn mamba i et tre. Under opplæringen havner Mbali i livsfare da hun skal fange sin første svarte mamba. Den store ildprøven blir å fange en stor svart mamba som gjemmer seg i et hageskjul.

programme.title: Slanger i byen: Høydepunkter sesong
programme.desc: Simon og Sioux vil redde Indias "fire store" dødelige slanger for første gang i karrieren. Simon tar på hodet til en kobraslange for første gang på kamera. En Russells huggorm gjemmer seg i en travel park midt i byen. En av verdens giftigste slanger, en indisk krait, skjuler seg i en sko utenfor en families hus.

programme.title: Verdens dødeligste slanger
programme.desc: Slanger i Afrika blir rangert fra minst til mest dødelig. I Afrika er mambaer og kobraer farlige og dødelige, men med pytoner, huggormer og verdens giftigste snoker lagt til i miksen, er det mange flere uventede kandidater som kjemper om tittelen om å være dødeligst.

programme.title: Verdens dødeligste slanger
programme.desc: I Indo-Stillehavet finnes noen av verdens raskeste giftslanger, enorme pytonslanger og kongekobraer. Se hvem som er den farligste!

programme.title: Verdens dødeligste slanger
programme.desc: Hvilken slange er den farligste i Amerika? Det er lett å tro at det enten er klapperslanger og anakondaer, men det finnes noen uventede utfordrere. I World’s Deadliest Snakes blir hver av dem rangert, og den farligste og dødeligste avsløres.

programme.title: Snakes in the City
programme.desc: Simon og Sioux er imponert over respekten den indiske lokalbefolkningen har for sine giftige slangenaboer. Oppdragene strømmer inn, og Snake Shyam hjelper med å redde en livsfarlig Russells huggorm fanget i netting. Syams sønn, surya, ødelegger betongtrinn for å hjelpe Simon og Sioux med å endelig fange en rottesnok. Så går duoen sammen med Gowri Shanker for å fange og slippe ut to enorme kongekobraer.

programme.title: Snakes in the City
programme.desc: En farlig hetebølge pågår i India, som betyr at flere livsfarlige slanger er på leting etter ly. Simon og Sioux blir med Snake Shyam og Gowri Shanker for å kjempe mot heten og redde de skjulte slangene. Teamet prøver å redde en brilleslange fra et vannhull og en livsfarlig Russells huggorm skjuler seg i en bokhandel. For første gang på 30 år redder Simon en kongekobra helt på egen hånd.

programme.title: Snakes in the City
programme.desc: Simon, Sioux og Mbali deler seg opp fordi oppdragene renner inn. Sioux og Mbali står overfor en kranglete svart mamba alene, mens Simon fanger en annen svart mamba alene. Så lærer Simon Mbali hvordan hun skal fange sin første spyttende kobra mens Sioux fokuserer på en unnvikende boomslange. Til sist redder Simon en stor slange fra et skur mens Mbali og Sioux får kontroll på en svart mamba.

programme.title: Snakes in the City
programme.desc: Simon og Sioux er imponert over respekten den indiske lokalbefolkningen har for sine giftige slangenaboer. Oppdragene strømmer inn, og Snake Shyam hjelper med å redde en livsfarlig Russells huggorm fanget i netting. Syams sønn, surya, ødelegger betongtrinn for å hjelpe Simon og Sioux med å endelig fange en rottesnok. Så går duoen sammen med Gowri Shanker for å fange og slippe ut to enorme kongekobraer.
